qa_pairs.question: What modules must be loaded on a cluster to prepare for compiling the `petscFoam` solver?
qa_pairs.answer: To prepare for compiling the `petscFoam` solver, you must load the following modules: `StdEnv/2023`, `gcc/12.3`, `openmpi/4.1.5`, `openfoam/v2412`, and `petsc/3.21.6`.

qa_pairs.question: How does one download and extract the `external-solver-main.tar.gz` package needed for compiling the `petscFoam` solver?
qa_pairs.answer: After loading the necessary modules (e.g., `module load StdEnv/2023 gcc/12.3 openmpi/4.1.5 openfoam/v2412 petsc/3.21.6`), you download the package using `wget https://develop.openfoam.com/modules/external-solver/-/archive/main/external-solver-main.tar.gz` and then extract it with `tar xvfz external-solver-main.tar.gz`.
